summary: CLI Proxy API is a proxy server that provides compatible API interfaces for various AI models, enabling users to access multiple accounts through a command-line interface. It simplifies the integration of AI capabilities for developers and teams by offering load balancing and support for various models like OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini.
use_cases: Accessing multiple AI models from a single CLI interface
Managing API keys and usage statistics for different AI accounts
Integrating AI capabilities into development tools like Amp CLI
